summary: Completed e2e testing of admin transaction CRUD, auto-unfreeze on deposit, KYC status changes, password reset toggle, and display toggles. All 32 backend tests pass. All frontend features verified working correctly.

issues: Minor React hydration warnings (span/tr nesting in table) - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: All features implemented correctly - transaction CRUD, auto-unfreeze logic, KYC status dropdown, password reset toggle working as expected
seed_data_creation: Created testinactive@test.com user with inactivity freeze for auto-unfreeze testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: Transaction CRUD (add/edit/delete), auto-unfreeze on deposit for inactivity-frozen users, KYC status dropdown in Actions tab, password_reset_required toggle, display toggles (show_fees_alert, show_freeze_alert). User dashboard shows correct alerts based on user state (password reset, fees, freeze).
verified_features: Admin can add transactions (deposit, withdrawal) - Add Transaction button opens modal with all fields
Admin can edit transactions - Edit button (pencil icon) on each transaction
Admin can delete transactions - Delete button (trash icon) on each transaction
Auto-unfreeze on deposit - Adding deposit to inactivity-frozen user auto-unfreezes them (freeze_type: none, account_status: active)
Admin can change KYC status - Dropdown in Actions tab (not_started, pending, under_review, approved, rejected)
Admin can toggle password_reset_required - Switch in KYC & Security Settings section
Display toggles (show_fees_alert, show_freeze_alert) - Visible/Hidden toggles in User Display Controls section
User sees correct alerts - Password Reset Required alert (blue), Outstanding Fees alert (red), Freeze alerts (orange)
Auto-refresh - Dashboard refreshes every 30 seconds (implemented in useEffect)
Transaction history in user dashboard - Shows all transactions with fees and status
notes: Quick Actions section has 'Add €100 Reactivation Deposit' button with note about auto-unfreeze
KYC approval sends password reset email and sets password_reset_required=true
Display toggles control what alerts user sees in dashboard - when OFF, alerts are hidden
